metadata.description: Claude Code skills and plugins by jsvisa

plugins.name: evm-decoder
plugins.description: Decode EVM transaction calldata, event logs, and fetch verified contract ABIs across any EVM chain via eth-decoder.vercel.app

plugins.name: solexplain
plugins.description: Explain Solana transactions in human-readable form — programs, SOL/token transfers, and protocol-specific actions (Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, Drift, Pump.fun, and more)
